1894700.name: Playhead
1894700.description:
Playhead is a puzzle-platformer based inside a media player that uses the familiar timeline ui to manipulate time and progress through the levels.
You are a bot looking for glitches in the system and trying to fix them.
Get hints and tips in the comments section of each level and watch some story unfold.

Features include:
Unique time minipulation interface
Around 100 levels
Dislectek and more accessibility
Community Cameos
